reviews.review_msg: I am no longer continuing political science after this class so my opinion may be irrelevant. He is a good prof but his class is extremely tough, he expects you to know specifics about politics and french vocab relating to politics before the course begins. Readings take a ton of time especially if french isn't your first language. I took POL100.
Jeremie is not a great teacher. He does give you chances to redeem yourself with some work, but he makes things way harder than they should be and picks students he believes are better than others
